immediateFindings.summary: Living Brief gate credential failed after publication for the fifth reported time and must not be reseeded or overwritten by startup, build, mirror sync, or publish.
Living Brief gate reset authority requires durable credential storage, fail-closed missing state, revalidated Super Administrator reset, immutable audit, rate limiting, and session invalidation.
Security Batch A and the related persistent safety notice require defensive security work to stay bounded, sanitized, non-circumventing, and composable with strict Living Brief impact gates.
Owner credential continuity exception preserves current working integration credential material value-blind during development and makes final launch hardening a mandatory blocker.

immediateFindings.summary: Telegram notifications are terminal-turn return-to-computer alerts for every stopped assigned work cycle, not only completion notices.
Future orchestration directives and terminal summaries must report one honest sanitized notification EventId, delivery result, and message ID or exact blocker.
